untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of 'formation completion' and 'breakout confirmation' which are pattern-recognition concepts not expressible with the allowed indicators. The formation period duration (39 days bull / 57 days bear) is context-dependent and cannot be parameterized without pattern detection logic. Donchian channels used as proxy for breakout detection, but this does not capture the full formation-based pattern logic described by Bulkowski.
translation_notes: Used Donchian Channel upper/lower as proxy for breakout detection. Exit set to throwback return to breakout price level (approximated by reversal to prior close). Hold period set to 11 days per source. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per signal specification. This is a simplified mechanical interpretation; the true pattern requires visual formation identification and market regime assessment not available through technical indicators alone.
